components.text: The Pill Cauldron is an important block that all cultivators should know about!

The Pill Cauldron is the most important block in the entire game!

It will allow you to craft pills to increase the chance of breaking through. 

It will also allow Pill Creation for a plethora of pills such as Fasting, Regeneration, Cleansing, Inner Reinforcement and Rebirth Pills ETC....

In order to actually craft inside this Pill Cauldron. You need the Required Ingredients and also Heat! 

To add heat simply Right Click the block with specific items! 

These items are currently Flame adding 8 Heat, Soul Flame adding 16 and Crimson Fire Lotus adding 200 Heat! 
Do be careful as Heat slowly drains by itself!
